The 1.9m swell and cross-wind suggests a workout more than a ride, assuming you enjoy being bounced around a bit.
🌊 Swell: 1.9m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 4.0km/h ESE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 7.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 💨 1.2m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
